message:
fix(numpy): fix Zig 0.15 random API and complete numpy.random module

- Fix intRangeLessThan API change (now requires 3 args: type, min, max)
- All numpy.random functions working: seed, rand, randn, randint, uniform, choice, shuffle, permutation
- Tested with seed(42), rand(5), randn(5), randint(0,10,5), uniform(0,1,5)
